page_metadata.biotools__summary: HexSE is a Python module designed to simulate sequence evolution along a phylogeny while considering the coding context of the nucleotides. The ultimate porpuse of HexSE is to account for multiple selection preasures on Overlapping Reading Frames.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: HexSE is a Python module designed to simulate sequence evolution along a phylogeny while considering the coding context of the nucleotides. The ultimate porpuse of HexSE is to account for multiple selection preasures on Overlapping Reading Frames.
